Name: Qingyi's Namecard
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Qingyi Mindscape Cinema [Drink Hot Water].
Desc2:
A card with the image of a Criminal Investigation Special Response Team member on it.
The card reads: "I'm a Public Security Officer. If you have any clues, please contact me."
The card is printed with the name "Clynes" and a phone number. [/INST] A card with the image of a Criminal Investigation Special Response Team member on it.
